title: canthium oliganthum var. microphyllum
intro: Canthium oliganthum var. microphyllum, also known as the "Small-flowered Canthium", is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Canthium oliganthum var. microphyllum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a wound healer. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water or oil to create a decoction or tincture that can be used to treat various health conditions.
